F03.params: allow only sign(EMA20_H4 slope over 3 H4)==dir

F05.params: allow only 20d extreme printed in last 3d (dir side)

F07.params: allow only VR(10)>1.00 (250 H1 log rets)

F10.params: US idx: block longs if USDJPY 6-bar<-0.5xATR_JPY (mirrored)

F13.params: USDJPY longs: AUDJPY 6-bar<-2.0xATR14 (real cross used: spec's synthetic AUDUSDxUSDJPY impossible, no AUDUSD on tape)

F14.params: index must own largest |6-bar/ATR| of the 3 indices

F15.params: block mean M15 spread(sig hour)>2x trailing-20 same-hour median; USDJPY no spread series -> never vetoed

F16.params: block 2xmean spread(last 4 M15)>0.10xATR; USDJPY no spread series -> never vetoed

F18.params: block sum|gaps|(5 internal, bars i-5..i)>=0.35x|c[i]-c[i-5]| (engine move)

F20.params: block stop within 0.10xATR of round grid (grid=10^(floor(log10(med close))-2))

F21.params: block prior-day extreme strictly inside limit->TP path

F24.params: block if same-dir actionable signal in prior 8 bars

F25.params: block volume z>3 vs trailing 100 prior bars

F26.params: H1 grain: allow only mean TR(i-17..i-6)<=0.90xATR[i-6] (window pre-dates the 6-bar impulse; M15 reading would sit inside it)

F27.params: indices: block last+first trading day of month

F28.params: block if <3 H1 bars to weekly close (gap>24h boundary)

F29.params: block if M15 grid gap or >2 zero-range bars in last 24 M15

F30.params: block if >20 of 96 closes within +-0.5xATR of TP (mirrored)

G14.params: keep only first armed signal of server-day per symbol

H01.params: block longs if prior-day IBS>0.8 (mirror shorts <0.2)

R02.params: ToM window (last1+first3): longs only inside, shorts only outside

R06.params: USDJPY: block last 3 TD of Mar and Sep

R07.params: USDJPY: longs only if dollar index>SMA200 (mirrored)

R08.params: indices: longs only above own SMA200(H1) (mirrored); USDJPY exempt

R10.params: block when median ATRp of 4 traded symbols>90

R11.params: block when median ATRp of 4 traded symbols<10

R12.params: block longs after 3 consecutive red days (mirrored)

X01.params: exit at close if MAE>=0.6R before MFE>=+0.5R (same-bar tie: MFE disarm wins)

X02.params: exit next open if fill bar closes >=0.25xATR past fill price

X03.params: if fill-bar penetration>0.4xATR: TP 1.2R + hold 5 from bar j+1

X04.params: exit at 2nd consecutive close beyond entry

X05.params: at close of bar 4 (j+3): if MFE<+0.5R stop tightens to 0.5xATR

X10.params: exit at close when ATR14[k]<0.7 x signal ATR

X11.params: flatten at close on opposite actionable signal

X12.params: close all at last bar with open <= Fri 20:00 UTC

X13.params: JP225 exits at last bar with open <= 06:00 UTC (others control)

X15.params: structural stop = 20-bar swing extreme, distance clipped at 1.25xATR (R-units re-based; degenerate non-positive distance -> control 1xATR; M15-fill-realism caveat binds)

X16.params: TP at 20-bar swing extreme, distance clipped to [1.2R, 3.0R]; bank kept

X18.params: after bank fills: one limit at original entry for 3 bars re-enters the half

X21.params: stop evaluated at bar close only; fill next open; bank+TP unchanged

X22.params: no TP/no bank: opposite-signal close, 1R stop, or 45-bar cap

X23.params: runner: chandelier 3xATR(22) ratchet replaces TP; bank kept; 45-bar cap (frozen)

X24.params: runner: EMA20-cross close exit replaces TP; bank kept; 45-bar cap (frozen)

spec_forfeits.G13: adjacent to Q2 re-place + M2-REPLACE recovery nulls
spec_forfeits.X14: no live spread series at exit timestamps in tape

statistic_conventions.alignment: last aux H1 bar with open epoch <= signal bar open epoch
statistic_conventions.fdr: Benjamini-Hochberg q=0.1 over the 69-cell run set (grid families collapsed to their entrant; diagnostics excluded)
frozen_choices: X23/X24 runner cap = 45 bars (X22's cap; hold-8 would make a 3xATR22 trail unreachable) - flagged as a frozen harness choice
F13 uses the REAL AUDJPY cross (no AUDUSD on the frozen tape so the spec's synthetic AUDUSDxUSDJPY is unbuildable; the real cross is economically identical with a true-range ATR)
F09/R07 AUDUSD dollar-basket leg synthesized exactly as AUDJPY/USDJPY (log-return identity)
F26 computed on H1 (spec window t-17..t-6 pre-dates the impulse only on H1; an M15 reading would sit inside it)
R02 ToM window = last 1 + first 3 trading days
R15 breadth = fraction of 6-basket above SMA200(H1)
R14/F11 risk-dir = longs on all four symbols
X15 swing = 20-bar extreme; non-positive distance -> control
X18 re-entry: fill checked before SL within the bar; bank latch not re-armed; +0.5x round-trip cost
trading-day calendars use the symbol's realized tape days (ex-ante-knowable market schedule)
statistic_conventions.overlay: E2 mean-R gap (kept-vetoed); p=P(within-symbol perm gap>=obs); delta_full=mean_kept-mean_all (materiality); delta_oos=mean_kept_oos-mean_all_oos; n gate = n_veto>=50 AND n_kept>=50
statistic_conventions.plateau: adapted WFO_SPEC sec.4: all one-step neighbors' pooled E2 expectancy >= candidate - 20%|candidate|; control counts at its own expectancy; candidate = highest OOS delta that is plateau-consistent; one entrant per grid family into FDR
statistic_conventions.variant: E2 pooled expectancy delta vs control; p=frac of 2000 paired-by-day (union days, shared draw) bootstrap deltas<=0; n gate = variant n>=50

zero_veto_cells.F15: verified genuine, not a bug: at SIGNAL bars the max spread / same-hour-median ratio is 1.13 (US30) / 1.05 (US100) / 1.40 (JP225) vs >2 required; the huge spread spikes (up to 239x) occur in hours that never produce signals or inflate their own hour median.  USDJPY has no spread series (noted).
zero_veto_cells.F17: structural on this book: 3x mean M15 TR(8) always exceeds 0.6xATR_H1 at signal bars (max observed ratio 0.73, US30).
zero_veto_cells.F22: structural: after a >=2-ATR 6-bar impulse the 0.6-ATR pullback limit sits far above the 5-bar structure low (min observed margin +1.45 ATR, US30).
